title: Regarding the Organization of a Student Congress for Project-based Elective Courses
content:
Regarding the Organization of a Student Congress for Project-based Elective Courses

Dear students,

Information regarding the Student Congress for Project-Based Elective Courses, organized by the Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, has been

shared

in the announcement.

The Student Congress for Project-Based Elective Courses will be held between June 1-10, 2026.

For your information.
